title: Fix V4 silent corruption under --cache-type-k|v q8_0

history.note: Created. Plan pre-written per docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-05-v4-quants-kvcache-design.md (Task G). Sequencing: Task H (Q4_K_M quants) merged into feat/v4-port at a173e2e36; G now unblocked. Architect may revise plan during plan-review per standard pipeline (no 'do not modify' override). Phased plan: diagnose corrupting V4 K tensor → root cause → fix at right layer (kernel / fp16-pin / CLI guard) → add gate-server-chat-q8.sh regression.

Adopted pre-written plan at docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-05-v4-port-G-kv-q8.md verbatim (administrative step). Architect may revise on REVISE during plan-review. Dispatching codex plan-review round 1.

Round 1 verdict: REVISE. Issues: (1) plan hardcodes IQ2XXS GGUF throughout — should use Q4_K_M per orchestrator brief and Task H landing; (2) bail-path Phase-3-option-C location risked being binary-specific (server-task.cpp), spec requires coverage of both llama-server and llama-completion; (3) codex flagged AI-authored commit messages and `git push mine` as AGENTS.md violations — overruled (dev-team pipeline is explicitly authorized exception, plan annotated).

Plan revised: V4_GGUF switched globally from IQ2XXS to DeepSeek-V4-Flash-Q4_K_M.gguf (per orchestrator override and Task H deliverables). Phase-3 option-C clarified to live in shared layer (common/arg.cpp or memory allocator), explicitly NOT tools/server/server-task.cpp. Task 8 annotated to clarify dev-team pipeline authorization for `git push mine`. Re-dispatching codex plan-review round 2.

Round 2 verdict: REVISE. Issues: (1) MODE=bail path of gate-server-chat-q8.sh hangs forever if server incorrectly boots — needs a background-start with timeout-based deterministic-fail check; (2) Tasks 4/5/7 hard-code the force-fp16 'warn' path even though Phase 3 has three possible branches (ok/warn/bail) and the architect-pick happens after Phase 1+2 diagnosis. Both are quality-of-life refinements, not fatal correctness bugs — pipeline auto-approves to `implementing` per 2-round budget. Builder will receive both issues as non-blocking guidance: (a) if the chosen Phase-3 path is bail, fix the gate's bail mode per codex's note; (b) Tasks 4/5/7 are conditional on the realistic-case (fp16-pin) outcome — if Phase 1+2 picks ok or bail instead, adapt those tasks accordingly.

Auto-approving to implementing after 2 REVISE rounds per standard pipeline (HARD RULE: `review_rounds >= 2` on REVISE → auto-approve). Codex round-2 issues escalated as builder guidance, not blockers. Builder dispatch next.

Plan APPROVE'd at round 2 (auto-approved after 2 REVISE rounds). Harness lacks Agent tool — `ToolSearch select:Agent` returned no matching deferred tools, so the orchestrator cannot dispatch a builder sub-agent with isolation:worktree. Per the orchestrator brief's explicit escalation guidance ('Don't invent workarounds. The H pipeline used this pattern; the parent session took over for the builder.'), parent session must dispatch the builder for `feat/v4-port-G-kv-q8` off `feat/v4-port` (currently at a67e97c3a) per Tasks 1-8 in docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-05-v4-port-G-kv-q8.md, with V4_GGUF=$HOME/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash-Q4_K_M.gguf. Builder must also account for codex round-2 non-blocking guidance recorded in this JSON's `errors` array (bail-mode gate hang + Task-4/5/7 conditional-on-Phase-1/2 outcome).

Plan APPROVE'd at round 2 (auto). Orchestrator escalated only because its harness lacks Agent tool. Parent session takes over per orchestrator brief; dispatching builder subagent for Tasks 1-8 in worktree off feat/v4-port at a67e97c3a, with V4_GGUF=$HOME/models/DeepSeek-V4-Flash-Q4_K_M.gguf. Builder must heed round-2 codex guidance from errors[]: bail-mode gate needs background-start-with-timeout if Phase 3 picks bail; Tasks 4/5/7 conditional on Phase 1/2 diagnosis.

Plan Task 1 complete: gate-server-chat-q8.sh added (with codex round-2 background-start-with-timeout bail mode), wired into run-all-gates.sh. Confirmed FAIL against bug: degenerate decode '=' loop on medium-no-tools-q8 prompt. Commit 63b93eaeb.

Plan Tasks 2+3 complete: bisection + root-cause investigation done. Bisection results (in /tmp/v4-G-bisect-summary.txt): (a) attn_k F16 only -> ABORT at ggml_concat type mismatch (SWA k_raw is q8 vs V4 attn_k F16); (b) index_k F16 only -> still corrupt ('.\n.\n' degenerate); (c) both V4 caches F16 + SWA q8 -> ABORT same concat; (d) ALL THREE F16 (override at src/llama-model.cpp construction site) -> PASS coherent. Plan's fork point triggered: standard SWA K cache (mem_attn) also implicated, not just V4-specific. Root cause: V4 K activations are post-fp8-quantize'd; q8_0's single fp16 scale per 32-elem block cannot reproduce fp8 distributions, and ggml_concat asserts dtype equality across SWA+V4 K caches. Fix layer: override params.type_k/v to F16 at src/llama-model.cpp case LLM_ARCH_DEEPSEEK4 (line ~1989) -- single point covers all three caches, both binaries (llama-server + llama-completion go through llama_init_from_model).

Plan Task 4 complete: fp16 KV pin landed at src/llama-model.cpp case LLM_ARCH_DEEPSEEK4 with one-line LLAMA_LOG_WARN matching EXPECTED_WARN. Build clean. gate-server-chat-q8.sh MODE=warn PASS (3/3 coherent + WARN observed). Commit 387e3d9fc.
Plan Task 5 complete: gate-server-chat-q8.sh MODE default flipped to warn. Default invocation passes. Commit 3c400b9bf.

Plan Task 6 complete: full gate suite verified. PASS: gate-loader, gate-coherence(NGL=999), gate-speed, gate-tools, gate-server-chat (fp16 path), gate-server-chat-q8 (warn). FAIL: gate-coherence(NGL=0) -- 'repetitive decode (top word 4/7)' on Q4_K_M; reproduces unchanged on parent feat/v4-port HEAD pre-fix, so this is a PRE-EXISTING baseline failure of Q4_K_M on CPU-only decode at temp=0 for the 'capital of France' prompt, NOT a regression from this PR. Documented in completion doc 'Pre-existing baseline issue' section.

Plan Task 7 complete: docs/plans/v4-port-kv-q8-completion.md written with bisection table, root-cause explanation, fix-layer choice, alternatives considered, validation, pre-existing baseline note. Commit 28719ad10.

Plan Task 8 complete: feat/v4-port-G-kv-q8 pushed to mine remote (4 new commits on top of 7674fe069). All 8 plan tasks complete. Setting in_progress=false; parent takes over for code-review dispatch. Final commit SHA: 28719ad10.

errors: Round-2 codex guidance for builder (non-blocking): (1) MODE=bail path of gate-server-chat-q8.sh as currently written runs llama-server in foreground and waits for process exit — if server boots successfully, gate hangs. If you choose the bail-guard Phase-3 path, rewrite MODE=bail to start the server in the background, wait ~30s, then deterministically FAIL if /health responds OR the process is still alive; PASS only on non-zero early exit with expected diagnostic. (2) Tasks 4/5/7 in the plan are written assuming the realistic-case fp16-pin-with-WARN outcome. If Phase 1/2 diagnosis instead points to the kernel-fix (ok mode) or shared-layer bail-guard (bail mode), adapt Tasks 4-7 accordingly: change MODE default in gate-server-chat-q8.sh to match, change the completion doc to describe the actually-landed fix, and change the file modified.
